hero.title: GOHAM Community Church
hero.subtitle: A place of worship, community, and grace for all who seek.

events.title: Easter Sunday Service
events.desc: Join us for a special Easter celebration with worship, prayer, and a message of hope.

events.title: Youth Camp 2025
events.desc: An exciting week away for teens and young adults. Registration opens soon.

events.title: Harvest Night
events.desc: An evening of thanksgiving, music, and fellowship. Bring the whole family.

about.history: Founded in 1987, Grace Community Church has been a cornerstone of faith and community in our region. What began as a small gathering of believers has grown into a vibrant congregation united by love, service, and the Word of God.
about.extra: We believe that every person has worth and dignity, and that the local church is the hope of the world. Our doors are open to all.

pastor.name: Pastor James Moyo
pastor.bio: Serving Grace Church since 2005, Pastor James leads with a heart for the community and a passion for Biblical teaching.

values.title: Worship
values.desc: We gather to honour God through heartfelt worship, prayer, and the study of Scripture together as a family of believers.

values.title: Community
values.desc: We are stronger together. Through fellowship, small groups, and shared meals, we build lasting relationships rooted in faith.

values.title: Service
values.desc: Faith without action is incomplete. We serve our local community through outreach, care programmes, and acts of compassion.
